# Encode HyperlaneMessage

```
{ "message":
  { "version": 1
  , "nonce": 1223
  , "originDomain": 7
  , "sender": "0x23"
  , "destinationDomain": 8
  , "recipient": "0x71c7656ec7ab88b098defb751b7401b5f6d8976f"
  , "tokenMessage":
    { "recipient": "recipient1"
    , "amount": 3333333333333333333.333333333333333333 }
  }
}
```

should return

```
{ "encodedMessage": ""
, "messageId": "0xd7d22abdd68430821df0732b7bb87cd05536810cc9fc29d3fbe22cfd359ba190"
}
```

# ValidatorAnnounce

```
{ "storageLocation": "some hex string"
, "signature": "some hex string"
}
```

should return

```
{ "address": "some address in hex" }
```

# verify

```
{ "message": ""
, "metadata": ""
, "validators": ["validator1 in hex", "validator2 in hex", ...]
, "threshold": 5
}
```

should return

```
{ "messageId": "0xd7d22abdd68430821df0732b7bb87cd05536810cc9fc29d3fbe22cfd359ba190"
, "message":
  { "version": 1
  , "nonce": 1223
  , "originDomain": 7
  , "sender": "0x23"
  , "destinationDomain": 8
  , "recipient": "0x71c7656ec7ab88b098defb751b7401b5f6d8976f"
  , "tokenMessage":
    { "recipient": "recipient1"
    , "amount": 3333333333333333333.333333333333333333 }
  }
, "verified": true
}
```

# pact

```
(verify-spv "HYPERLANE_V3" {...}) # pass an object like from the examples above
```
